<p align="center">
  <strong>The operating layer for digital code distribution.</strong>
</p>

<p align="center">
  Multi-channel sync, dynamic pricing, and order orchestration —
  built for sellers who run inventory across every sales channel
  from a single console.
</p>

<p align="center">
  <a href="https://midfeed.com">midfeed.com</a>
</p>

---

### What we build

- **AI pricing** — reinforcement-learning models that watch every
  competitor move, score thousands of SKUs a minute, and decide the
  next price within per-product profit guardrails.
- **AI cash-flow forecasting** — automated sell-through, margin, and
  liquidity projections per channel and per supplier, surfaced as
  decision-ready dashboards instead of raw spreadsheets.
- **AI ticket support** — LLM-powered triage, draft replies, and
  policy-aware automations that close routine refund / delivery /
  account tickets in seconds — humans only step in when they have to.
- **Custom agents for sales workflows** — composable agents that
  pick stock, push prices, open auctions, chase suppliers, react to
  webhooks, and own end-to-end flows the operator used to script
  by hand.
- **Multi-channel sync** — listings, stock, orders, and refunds
  kept consistent in real time across every connected sales channel,
  with a unified audit trail for every action an agent or human takes.
- **Operator console** — dashboards, analytics, role-based access,
  and 2FA-gated destructive actions for the moments humans still
  pull the lever.

### How we work

- **Boring tech, end-to-end.** FastAPI + React, MongoDB, Redis,
  Celery / taskiq, Kubernetes managed by Flux. No cargo cults.
- **Operability first.** Every subsystem ships with metrics,
  dashboards, and a runbook before it lands in production.
- **Tight feedback loops.** Preview environments per branch,
  Playwright in CI, observability for anything that can page.

### Get in touch

- Sales & partnerships — [midfeed.com/contact](https://midfeed.com/contact)
